creator: ray.kohler@mail.com
text:
databases/gnome-db and databases/libgda have had their distfiles repackaged by the vendor without a version bump again. The checksums don't match and the patches don't apply cleanly any more (but ti appears as if patch-aa in libgda was applied by the vendor now).

Fix: 

regen checksums and patches
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/gnome-db && make install
